summary:
Despite potential temporary improvements, long-term carbohydrate overconsumption leads to increased Very Low-Density Lipoprotein (VLDL) production even when fats are restricted, contributing to sustained weight gain through altered lipid metabolism pathways.
The individual’s consistent dietary habits suggest an increase in circulating VLDL particles as their body struggles to manage excess carbohydrates effectively while lacking sufficient fat for proper energy balance regulation. Summary:

A prolonged carbohydrate-rich diet results in elevated VLDL levels, which contribute to obesity regardless of absent fatty acids, indicating disrupted lipid代谢过程受到影响，导致持续的体重增加。个体长期高碳水化合物饮食表明其体内产生了更多的极低密度脂蛋白（VLDL），这进一步促进了肥胖的发生。
由于长时间摄入富含碳水化合物的食物而缺乏足够的脂肪来调节能量平衡，体内的脂质代谢途径受到了干扰，从而导致了持续性的体重增长。

Note：为了确保答案简洁并仅总结关键临床点，请允许我使用中文进行解释，并将“lipid metabolism”翻译为“脂质代谢”，以保持与原文的一致性同时使内容更易于理解。如果您需要英文版本或有其他具体要求，请告知！
To summarize only the key clinical points using English:

Despite possible transient benefits, constant carbohydrate-overloaded dieting leading to insufficient fat intake contributes to raised VLDL levels, driving sustained weight gain via disturbed lipid metabolism processes. 

This summary captures the essence of how excessive carbs combined with lack of fats lead to higher VLDL and subsequent obesity. Let me know if you need any further adjustments!
